title: Filipino Cabbage Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole dish combining the best of Filipino and Western flavors. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the cabbage until tender.
In a separate bowl, mix the crushed crackers, grated cheese, and dried flowers.
Combine the cooked cabbage and the cracker mixture in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
